body:
# 10 Entryway Essentials for a Warm First Impression

The entryway sets the tone for everything that follows — it is the first room guests see and the last space you move through before leaving the house. A warm yet striking entryway comes from layering organic textures and statement pieces: a honey-toned console as the anchor, a handwoven macrame panel on the wall above it, a patterned cream rug underfoot, and a caged chandelier overhead that casts warmth rather than brightness. These 10 pieces build that language from the ground up.

1. [VASAGLE Entryway Console Table, Honey Brown (Amazon)](https://www.amazon.com/s?k=VASAGLE+ULNT147KB01S&tag=ushpadpinsp-20)
2. [Boho Caged Chandelier, Mid-Century (Amazon)](https://www.amazon.com/Boho-Caged-Chandeliers-Chandelier-Mid-Century/dp/B0CSRZWQP6/ref=asc_df_B0CSRZWQP6?tag=ushpadpinsp-20)
3. [Addison Rugs Chantille — Stain-Resistant Patterned Area Rug (Amazon)](https://www.amazon.com/Addison-Rugs-Chantille-ACN591-Resistant/dp/B0CKTRMLYG/ref=asc_df_B0CKTRMLYG?tag=ushpadpinsp-20)
4. [IOWER Macrame Wall Hanging with Spherical Orbs, Handmade (Amazon)](https://www.amazon.com/IOWER-Macrame-Hanging-Sphericity-Handmade/dp/B0CP5N7FQB/ref=asc_df_B0CP5N7FQB?tag=ushpadpinsp-20)
5. [First of a Kind Round Ottoman, Olive Green with Spherical Wood Orbs (Amazon)](https://www.amazon.com/s?k=first+of+a+kind+round+ottoman+olive+green+spherical+wood+orbs&tag=ushpadpinsp-20)
6. [LB2 White Ceramic Vase, 11.8", Zen Terra Cotta Style (Amazon)](https://www.amazon.com/s?k=LB2+white+ceramic+large+vase+11.8+zen+terra+cotta+pitcher&tag=ushpadpinsp-20)
7. [Bloomingville 9.75" Stoneware Bowl with Reactive Glaze, Cream (Amazon)](https://www.amazon.com/s?k=Bloomingville+stoneware+bowl+reactive+glaze+cream&tag=ushpadpinsp-20)
8. [Modern Metal Iron Candelabra, 17", Black (Target)](https://www.target.com/s?searchTerm=modern+metal+iron+candelabra+17+black)
9. [Lukitas Thinker Decorative Bookends, Resin, 9", Bronze (Amazon)](https://www.amazon.com/dp/B0BNN6Z9R9?tag=ushpadpinsp-20)
10. [JONATHAN Y Oona 18" 2-Light Mid-Century Cactus LED Table Lamp, Gray Wood Finish (Amazon)](https://www.amazon.com/dp/B0CY3FSJ6G?tag=ushpadpinsp-20)

[Browse entryway layout plans on Etsy →](https://www.etsy.com/shop/athomeplans)

*Tags: Entryway Decor, Entryway Essentials, Warm Entryway Ideas, Console Table Decor, Organic Modern Entryway, Boho Entryway, Entryway Styling*
